oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Super 8 Prizes - 2023 Educational Conference
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Aviculture, American Federation of
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 50 Number 3 (July 2023).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.Click here to visit the website to purchase your raffle tickets!# 1 A $500 VISA CARD DONATED BY HILL COUNTRY AVIARIESClick the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: AFA Watchbird; Vol. 50 No. 3 (2023): Watchbird July 2023; 7
